code:
type Expr =
  | Num(value: Int)
  | Add(left: Expr, right: Expr)
  | Mul(left: Expr, right: Expr)

fn eval(expr: Expr) -> Int
  match expr
  when Num(value: v)
    v
  when Add(left: l, right: r)
    eval(l) + eval(r)
  when Mul(left: l, right: r)
    eval(l) * eval(r)
  end
end

let e = Expr.Mul(
  left: Expr.Add(
    left: Expr.Num(value: 2),
    right: Expr.Num(value: 3),
  ),
  right: Expr.Add(
    left: Expr.Num(value: 4),
    right: Expr.Num(value: 5),
  ),
)
let result = eval(e)
print("result=#{result}")
